mck_info.longBusinessSummary: Hoang Quan Consulting - Trading - Service Real Estate Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the real estate, education, and finance businesses in Vietnam. The company develops, invests in, and manages social housing projects, housing for workers, industrial park infrastructures, and residential properties, as well as invests in commercial real estate properties. It also offers architectural design for the civil and industrial works and construction planning; constructing civil, industrial, traffic, and backfilling works, as well as infrastructure for industrial parks and residential areas; legal consultancy for projects, preparing investment projects, and quality inspection for the construction works. In addition, the company provides appraisal services, including valuating the real estates, such as houses, workshops, infrastructures, land, etc.; machines, plants, production chains, means of transportation; investment projects comprising high-rise building, office building, industrial parks, hotels, tourism etc.; and investment projects that includes high-rise building, office building, industrial parks, hotels, tourism, etc., as well as forests, natural resources, and mineral exploitation rights etc. Further, it offers real estate market research; information consulting the price of assets, goods, and services in the markets, etc.; and appraisal and real estate training services, as well as legal and consulting services on real estate, bank capital borrowing, finance, banking, tax, insurance, import-export, labor, recruitment, projects, and other relevant legal sectors. Additionally, the company engages in investment activities, high-tech agriculture, civil and industrial construction business, and educational services. Hoang Quan Consulting - Trading - Service Real Estate Corporation was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.
